title: Create extract-op-fields prompt template
description: Create data/prompts/extract-op-fields.md with a structured prompt template for OP field extraction including role, task, chain-of-thought style analysis instructions, few-shot examples, and JSON output contract.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the template is loaded THEN it contains placeholders for op_id, source_text, parent_step, action, and knowledge_context; WHEN rendered THEN it names the Op JSON contract fields and includes at least two examples; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-intelligence-enhancement.md:187
review_initial_requirements: Check template has explicit role/task/output contract, structured reasoning guidance without requesting hidden chain-of-thought disclosure, few-shot examples, and no secrets.
review_regression_requirements: Run prompt-loader/template tests and npm test after integration.

title: Create generate-candidates prompt template
description: Create data/prompts/generate-candidates.md for implicit requirement discovery with role, task, reasoning guidance, two to three few-shot examples, JSON output including reasoning, and knowledge context.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the template is loaded THEN it contains existing_requirements, clarifications, coverage_summary, and knowledge_context placeholders; WHEN rendered THEN it requires source_hyperedge, source_ops, confidence, and reasoning in JSON candidates; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-intelligence-enhancement.md:208
review_initial_requirements: Check prompt asks for concise visible reasoning/evidence, not hidden chain-of-thought; validate JSON contract and source traceability fields.
review_regression_requirements: Run tests/inference.test.ts and npm test after integration.

title: Implement prompt template loader

acceptance_criteria: WHEN loadPromptTemplate("generate-candidates") runs THEN it loads data/prompts/generate-candidates.md; WHEN renderPrompt sees {{name}} placeholders THEN it replaces known variables, preserves unknown placeholders, and rejects unsafe template names; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-intelligence-enhancement.md:199
review_initial_requirements: Check path traversal protection, default data path under package data/prompts, deterministic substitution, and package inclusion.
